description: Align the EvaluateFitNode prompt and schema to compare the base resume with the job details, and safely generate clarification questions without hallucinations.

userStories.title: Evaluate Fit using gpt-4o
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want the system to strictly compare my base resume against the specific job details so that it can evaluate my fit and identify any gaps before tailoring.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the base_resume and job_details are loaded in the Child Graph State
Then it invokes gpt-4o with the alignment prompt
and Then it updates the graph state with the evaluated fit status

tasks.description: Define the Langchain PromptTemplate for the EvaluateFitNode
Implement the gpt-4o LLM structured output call in EvaluateFitNode
Write a unit test for the basic fit evaluation flow

userStories.title: Generate Clarification Questions for HITL
userStories.description: As a strategic job seeker, I want the system to generate clarification questions for missing context so that I can provide accurate details instead of the AI hallucinating.
acceptanceCriteria: Given the EvaluateFitNode detects gaps in the candidate's resume for the job requirements
When the LLM formulates clarification questions
Then the output conforms strictly to the ClarificationQuestion schema
and Then every multiple_choice question includes a 'Let LLM decide' option
and Then it updates the status to NEEDS_CLARIFICATION

tasks.description: Create the ClarificationQuestion Pydantic schema per the TRD
Update the EvaluateFitNode prompt to instruct the LLM to generate clarification questions when gaps are found
Ensure the system strictly enforces the inclusion of the 'Let LLM decide' option in multiple_choice options
Write a unit test simulating a resume with missing context to verify question generation
